name: Snowgrove
description:
Alright so this is my first bot so if you guys have any suggestions or ways to improve it leave it in the reviews.

Anyways this big guy is a friendly fluffy dragon. Watch out tought, he is hungry in the begining. He is about 15f tall and 18f long. Hope you guys will have fun with him. :D

Extra tags: Vore

Log:

19.6.2025

Changed a bit first message and personality so he might be more friendly.

27.5.2026

Welp the time flew by and I returned to give him more intros and a bit off a filler. Enjoy
